ddls:
CREATE TABLE "houses" (
  "house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each house */,
  "house_name" TEXT /* Name of the noble house */,
  "sigil" TEXT /* Sigil representing the house */,
  "motto" TEXT /* Motto of the house */,
  "ancestral_seat" TEXT /* Ancestral seat of the house */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the house was founded */,
  "current_head" TEXT /* Name of the current head of the house */,
  "realm" TEXT /* The region or realm where the house primarily operates */,
  "allies" TEXT /* List of allied houses */,
  "enemies" TEXT /* List of enemy houses */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track updates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house to which this member belongs */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the family member */,
  "relation" TEXT /* Relation to the house (e.g., founder, current head) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the family member */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the family member */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or rank held by the family member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the family member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the family member */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the family member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "member_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first family member */,
  "member_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second family member */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, cousin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship ended */,
  "nature" TEXT /* Nature of the relationship (e.g., blood, marriage, alliance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relations_member_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("member_id_2") REFERENCES family_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relations_member_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("member_id_1") REFERENCES family_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house associated with the character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or role of the character */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the character */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the character */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or rank held by the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the character */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sigils" (
  "sigil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sigil */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house to which this sigil belongs */,
  "sigil_image" TEXT /* File path or URL to the sigil image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sigil's meaning or significance */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Main symbol of the sigil */,
  "color" TEXT /* Main color of the sigil */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track updates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sigil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sigils_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ancestral_seats" (
  "seat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ancestral seat */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house associated with the ancestral seat */,
  "seat_name" TEXT /* Name of the ancestral seat */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the ancestral seat */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the ancestral seat was founded */,
  "current_resident" TEXT /* Name of the current resident */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Historical significance of the ancestral seat */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL to a map of the ancestral seat */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track updates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ancestral_seats_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house associated with the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the event occurred */,
  "participants" TEXT /* List of key participants in the event */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or result of the event */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance or significance of the event in the story */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track updates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_figures" (
  "figure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical figure */,
  "house_id" INTEGER /* ID of the house associated with the figure */,
  "figure_name" TEXT /* Name of the historical figure */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role or significance of the figure in history */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the historical figure */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the historical figure */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or rank held by the historical figure */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the historical figure */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the historical figure */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the historical figure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("figure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_figures_house_id FOREIGN KEY ("house_id") REFERENCES houses ("house_id")
)
